name: Diag menu API definitionConstants » Debug utilities
Script Testing Framework
description:
Introduction

Provides a unified and simple interface that emphasizes the smallest amount of boiler plate code possible.
The collection and instantiation of its primitives is performed right after the script compilation.
Within the framework a SINGLE test harness derived class can exist. The harness runs the tests and contains API to access them.
The test units are compiled to Suites. These provide additional API for environmental control.


Simple tests
Can be perfomed in form of annotated free functions.
Note: Notice the Suite name in the attribute.
[Test("MyFirstTestSuite")]
TestResultBase MyFooBarTest() { return TestBoolResult(5 > 3); }
TestResultBaseBase class for test results.Definition TestingFramework.c:198
TestAttribute used for tests annotation and assignment to Suites.Definition TestingFramework.c:97

Stateful tests
More elaborate tests that need some state and will run for several ticks have to be defined as TestBase derived classes. Your logic has to be ran through step methods.

Step methods

You can name your step methods however you like.
They have to be annotated by the [Step(Stage)] attribute which pairs the step with a stage.


Stages

They divide the steps into groups that express the initialization and finalization process.
Stages are executed in order Setup -> Main -> TearDown.
Methods in stages are executed in order of definition.


Return values

void -> Will get executed only once.
bool -> Will get executed every tick until true is returned.


Result

Result is set via API member method of TestBase SetResult(TestResultBase).
Setting a result which evaluates to failure will terminate the stage.


Failure unwind

If the Setup stage fails the test only terminates and TearDown is not called.
Main stage failure will trigger the TearDown.
TearDown failure will do nothing.


Timeout

The tests won't timeout by default. The value may be specified via Test attribute.
The timeout counter resets for every stage method.
If the stage method times out the TimeoutResult is set (it evaluates to failure and the failure unwind process starts).

[Test("MyFirstTestSuite", timeoutS: 2, timeoutMs: 250)]
class MyAsyncTest : TestBase
{
    // Simple blocking initialization.
    [Step(EStage.Setup)]
    void Initialize() { ... }
 
    // Async test which is waiting for result for several frames.
    [Step(EStage.Main)]
    bool Pool() { ... }
 
    // Finalization process waiting for result for several frames.
    [Step(EStage.TearDown)]
    bool FinalizeA() { ... }
 
    // Simple blocking finalization call.
    [Step(EStage.TearDown)]
    void FinalizeB() { ... }
}
EStageEStageStage definition used in conjunction with Step attribute.Definition TestingFramework.c:115
StepAttribute which marks a method as part of the testing process.Definition TestingFramework.c:124
TestBaseTest base class.Definition TestingFramework.c:178

values.name: NONE
values.description: No revision is locally available/downloaded and not subscribed (cannot download until subscribed).

values.name: BLOCKED
values.description: User has this asset blocked so it should not be possible to interact with it until unblocked.

values.name: SUBSCRIBED
values.description: Asset is subscribed but no revision is downloaded (waiting for request to begin download).

values.name: DISABLED
values.description: Asset is disabled and should not load any data until until enabled.

values.name: ENABLED
values.description: Asset is marked as enabled and its data should be loaded when possible.

values.name: LOADED
values.description: Asset is loaded and some operations should not be possible in this state.

values.name: PENDING_JOB
values.description: This asset has currently pending job and cannot be used until finished.

values.name: MISSING_DEPENDENCIES
values.description: Current revision is missing some dependencies and will not be allowed to be used (ENABLED and LOADED) until fixed.

values.name: CORRUPTED
values.description: Current revision is corrupted and cannot be used (ENABLED and LOADED) until fixed.

values.name: CORRUPTED_UNKNOWN
values.description: Asset has some data downloaded but unknown to which revision - cannot be repaired.

values.name: POPULARITY_NEW

values.description: ordered by how many people rated assets.

values.name: SUBSCRIBER_COUNT
values.description: ordered by how many people have currently subscribed those assets (should have downloaded right now).

values.name: UNIQUE_DOWNLOAD_COUNT
values.description: ordered by how many people have ever downloaded those assets.

values.name: LATEST_REVISION_SIZE
values.description: ordered by total size of latest revision of assets.

values.name: LATEST_REVISION_CREATED_AT
values.description: ordered by time when assets had latest update - latest revision created.

values.name: CREATED_AT
values.description: ordered by time when the assets were created.

values.name: POPULARITY_NEW
values.description: ordered by assets popularities prioritizing recently newly released.

values.name: POPULARITY_ALL_TIME
values.description: ordered by assets popularities regardless of when it was released.

values.name: RATING_COUNT
values.description: ordered by how many people rated assets.

values.name: SUBSCRIBER_COUNT
values.description: ordered by how many people have currently subscribed those assets (should have downloaded right now).

values.name: UNIQUE_DOWNLOAD_COUNT
values.description: ordered by how many people have ever downloaded those assets.

values.name: LATEST_REVISION_SIZE
values.description: ordered by total size of latest revision of assets.

values.name: LATEST_REVISION_CREATED_AT
values.description: ordered by time when assets had latest update - latest revision created.

values.name: CREATED_AT
values.description: ordered by time when the assets were created.

enums.name: EWorkshopJobState
enums.description: Determines state in which WorkshopJob currently is in.  More...

values.name: PREPARING
values.description: Job is preparing to be active.

values.name: ACTIVE
values.description: Job is currently actively processing its task.

values.name: QUEUED
values.description: Job is queued and waiting for other ACTIVE task to finish.

values.name: PAUSED
values.description: Job is paused and will not continue until resumed.

values.name: CANCELED
values.description: Job was canceled and will not do any additional actions.

values.name: FAILED
values.description: Job failed during its processing and can be retried.

enums.name: EWorkshopJobTask
enums.description: Determines what task is WorkshopJob supposed to do.  More...

values.name: DOWNLOAD
values.description: Job is downloading revision without any other revision of the asset present - fresh download.

values.name: UPDATE
values.description: Some revision is already present and job is downloading newer one.

values.name: DOWNGRADE
values.description: Some revision is already present and job is downloading older one.

values.name: VALIDATE
values.description: Job is doing deep validation where it attempts to find if any fragment is corrupted.

values.name: INIT
values.description: Workshop is initializing data and any systems or UI elements should wait until ready.

values.name: INIT_RETRY
values.description: Workshop init failed and retry will be attempted - semi-permanent state to indicate issues with INIT until success.

values.name: READY
values.description: Workshop is ready and can be used by other systems and UI - permanent state until application restart.

values.name: DISABLED
values.description: Workshop is disabled and any systems or UI elements should be also disabled - permanent state until application restart.
